Introduction

Here, you'll find a curated overview of my work as an Executive Virtual Assistant, reflecting my commitment to organization, efficiency, and seamless support. I believe that strong systems and reliable support are key to business growth, and I'm dedicated to helping teams stay focused and operate at their best.

About Me

A problem solver behind the scenes

Hi, I'm Iheoma, an Executive Virtual Assistant with 4 years experience and behind-the-scenes problem solver who genuinely enjoys bringing order to busy schedules, overflowing inboxes, and fast-moving teams. I specialize in turning overwhelming workdays into structured, manageable systems so you can focus on what truly matters, growing your business. I take pride in being reliable, proactive, and keeping everything organized, efficient, and running smoothly.

Revenue Generation & Work Accolades

$100K+

Cash-Collected Revenue

Generated over $100K in cash-collected revenue by implementing structured follow-up systems, managing client interactions effectively, and ensuring no opportunity slipped through the cracks; all while delivering consistent, high-quality execution.

Calendar Management

Multiple Calendar Management

I handle multiple calendars with a structured and proactive approach, ensuring schedules are aligned, priorities are clear, and conflicts are avoided. By coordinating across time zones and managing scheduling efficiently, I create a smooth, reliable system that keeps everything running on time and without stress.

Email Management

Inbox Zero, Always

Managing high-volume inboxes with precision — triaging, prioritizing, and responding to ensure nothing falls through the cracks. Every email handled with intentionality and professionalism.

Customer Support & Management

CRM & Client Relationship Management

Proficient in Zoho CRM and other platforms to manage client pipelines, track deals, and maintain seamless customer interactions at every stage — from onboarding calls to product delivery.
